evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of booking volume trends (daily, weekly, monthly, YoY), but the provided evidence only includes a single monthly total of bookings (342) without any breakdown or historical comparison. There is no evidence of daily or weekly trends, nor any year-over-year data, which constitutes a significant gap in the requirement. The evidence does not confirm the coverage of the required booking volume trends.
gaps: Lack of daily, weekly, and YoY booking volume data.
